heading: Art. 40. Continuances
label: 840 Art. 40. Continuances
text: The military judge or a summary court-martial may, for reasonable cause, grant a continuance to any party for such time, and as often, as may appear to be just.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)84050:615.(Art. 40), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 121
Amendments2016— substituted “summary court-martial” for “court-martial without a military judge”.Pub. L. 114–3281968— inserted reference to military judge.Pub. L. 90–632
